formatting.link_placement: Post fundraising link as FIRST COMMENT, not in post body. LinkedIn algorithm suppresses posts with external links.
formatting.cta_frequency: Every post should have a soft or hard call to action — donate, share, or comment.

tone.voice: Direct, honest, no corporate waffle. British English. Self-deprecating humour welcome. Never guilt-trip. Never fake emotion. Authenticity over polish.

content_types.story: Personal narrative, the 'why', learning about the cause
content_types.milestone: Training achievements, Fred Whitton, ride day
content_types.ask: Direct fundraising requests — honest, not apologetic
content_types.training: Behind-the-scenes training updates with honest reflections
